---
title: "Lab Notebook"
format: 
  dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    scrolling: true
    theme: cosmo
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(RSQLite)
library(tidyverse)
library(DT)

# 1. CONNECT
db_loc <- "lab_notebook.db"
if(!file.exists(db_loc)) db_loc <- "C:\\Users\\chase\\Documents\\Everything_Python\\lab_notebook.db"
con <- dbConnect(RSQLite::SQLite(), db_loc)

# 2. FETCH RAW DATA
raw_data <- tryCatch({
  dbGetQuery(con, "SELECT timestamp, category, content, raw_transcript FROM lab_notes ORDER BY timestamp DESC") %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  mutate(timestamp = as.POSIXct(timestamp, tz = "UTC"))
}, error = function(e) tibble())

dbDisconnect(con)

# 3. PROCESS DATA (Split -> Group -> Recombine)
if(nrow(raw_data) > 0) {
  
  # --- PART A: Modern Entries (Group by Transcript) ---
  df_modern <- raw_data %>%
    filter(!is.na(raw_transcript) & raw_transcript != "") %>%
    # Create the HTML for each individual tag
    mutate(
      tag_html = paste0(
        "<div style='margin-top: 4px; padding: 6px; background: #f8f9fa; border-left: 3px solid #007bff; border-radius: 2px; font-size: 0.9em; color: #444;'>",
        "<span class='badge bg-secondary' style='margin-right:6px;'>", category, "</span>",
        "<strong>", content, "</strong>",
        "</div>"
      )
    ) %>%
    # SQUASH: Combine all tags for one recording
    group_by(timestamp, raw_transcript) %>%
    summarize(
      combined_tags = paste(tag_html, collapse = ""),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    # FORMAT: The final display HTML
    mutate(
      display = paste0(
        # The Transcript (Visible)
        "<div style='margin-bottom: 6px; font-size: 1.05em; color: #2c3e50; font-weight: 500;'>", 
        raw_transcript, 
        "</div>",
        
        # The Dropdown (Hidden)
        "<details>",
        "<summary style='color: #888; font-size: 0.8em; cursor: pointer; font-weight:600;'>",
        "Show AI Extractions",
        "</summary>",
        "<div style='margin-top: 5px; margin-left: 10px;'>", 
        combined_tags, 
        "</div></details>"
      )
    ) %>%
    select(timestamp, display)

  # --- PART B: Legacy Entries (Keep Separate) ---
  df_legacy <- raw_data %>%
    filter(is.na(raw_transcript) | raw_transcript == "") %>%
    mutate(
      display = paste0(
        "<div style='font-weight: 600; color: #555;'>", content, "</div>",
        "<div style='font-size: 0.8em; color: #999; font-style: italic; margin-top: 4px;'>",
        "<span class='badge bg-light text-dark' style='border:1px solid #ccc; margin-right:5px;'>", category, "</span>",
        "[Legacy Data]</div>"
      )
    ) %>%
    select(timestamp, display)

  # --- PART C: Recombine & Sort ---
  final_df <- bind_rows(df_modern, df_legacy) %>%
    arrange(desc(timestamp))
    
} else {
  final_df <- tibble(timestamp = as.POSIXct(character()), display = character())
}
```



```{r}
if(nrow(final_df) > 0) {
  datatable(
    final_df %>% select(Date = timestamp, Entry = display),
    escape = FALSE,
    rownames = FALSE,
    options = list(
      pageLength = 10,
      dom = 'ftp', 
      autoWidth = FALSE, # Disable auto to force our custom width
      columnDefs = list(
        list(width = '150px', targets = 0), # Fixed width for Date
        list(className = 'dt-left', targets = '_all')
      )
    )
  )
} else {
  print("Notebook is empty.")
}
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Total Recordings"
list(
  icon = "mic",
  color = "primary",
  value = nrow(final_df)
)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Latest Activity"
if(nrow(final_df) > 0) {
  last_time <- head(final_df$timestamp, 1)
  diff <- round(difftime(Sys.time(), last_time, units="hours"), 1)
  list(icon = "clock", color = "secondary", value = paste0(diff, " hrs ago"))
} else {
  list(value = "N/A")
}
```

```{r}
if(nrow(raw_data) > 0) {
  raw_data %>%
    count(category) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = reorder(category, n), y = n)) +
    geom_col(fill = "#2c3e50", width = 0.6) +
    geom_text(aes(label=n), hjust=-0.5, size=3.5) +
    coord_flip() +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, face="bold")
    )
}
```
